stemHtml: What is shown on the ATC RADAR screen when the pilot pushes the Special Position Identification (SPI) button on the transponder?

options.a: A flashing indication of the aircraft which is "squawking ident".
options.b: A flashing indication of all the aircraft which are not "squawking ident".
options.c: The removal of that aircraft from the RADAR display.
options.d: A flashing indication of all the aircraft on the RADAR display.
